title: Better PokéRayou
description: An optimized and ready-to-play Cobblemon Minecraft modpack inspired by PokeRayou, featuring Cobblemon, integrated shaders, textures, and quality-of-life improvements.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1f13b509d28d692b9e8a66829e86edb6a9ec302.jpeg)

Better PokéRayou is a Minecraft modpack built around Cobblemon, inspired by the French roleplay server PokéRayou.
The goal of this modpack is simple: provide the best possible Cobblemon RP experience while keeping the game stable, clean, and easy to launch.


Better PokéRayou inspired by the official PokéRayou & Cobblemon Academy 2.0 Team

# 🎮 Core Gameplay

- Based on Cobblemon for creature collection, battles, and progression
- Better for Roleplay and Survival gameplay
- Respects the spirit of PokéRayou without modifying core Cobblemon mechanics
.
.

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f002fa1c44539836c4ea9fe0c897bc62d8bfd912.jpeg)

## 🖥️ Third-Party Launcher Compatible

The modpack has been adapted to work with third-party launchers
(such as Lunar Client or custom modded launchers), reducing conflicts between duplicate or overlapping mods.

## 📦 Ready to Play

- Easy to install
- Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
- Suitable for RP servers or private Cobblemon worlds

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2651d76db338cd3457f627d68c571e16183838f.jpeg)

## ✨ Shaders (Optional)

This modpack already includes integrated shaders, pre-configured for the best visual quality and performance balance.

You can enable them and choose the one you prefer directly in the video settings. 😉


![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38b5f363b14f5c30c4a5356fa2c5a47ff831c154.jpeg)
